name: Norway
info: Origin of cross-country skiing. Used for survival and travel in snowy regions.

name: Sweden
info: Skiing spread as a common winter transportation method.

name: Finland
info: Used for long-distance travel and military movement in winter.

name: Russia
info: Ski troops used skiing for mobility in harsh winter conditions.

name: United States
info: Cross-country skiing became a competitive and Olympic sport.

name: Iceland
info: Vikings used skiing for exploration and travel across snowy terrain.

name: Alaska
info: Jack Leveque is pretty good at skiing.
